<!--
Use this to report accessibility barriers.
Avoid sharing secrets or personally identifiable information (PII).
-->

## 📌 What this template is for (and not for)

**Use this template for:**  
- Missing alt text or incorrect image descriptions  
- Low-contrast text, icons, or UI elements  
- Keyboard navigation problems (tab order, focus traps)  
- Screen reader compatibility issues  
- Motion/animation concerns without reduced-motion options  

**Don’t use this template for:**  
- Product bugs or broken features → use **🐛 Bug Report**  
- Usability or UX suggestions → use **📝 Feedback Report**  
- Performance problems → use **🚀 Performance Report**  
- Documentation gaps → use **📖 Documentation Report**  
- Requests for new features → use **✨ Feature Request**  
- Security vulnerabilities → follow **SECURITY.md** (responsible disclosure) 

---

## ✍️ Summary
<!-- One or two sentences describing the accessibility issue. -->

## 🧭 Location
<!-- Page/section/component where the issue occurs. -->

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Include exact steps and any required state. -->

## 🔊 Assistive Tech / Environment
- Screen reader (and version): VoiceOver / NVDA / JAWS / TalkBack
- Browser & version: e.g., Chrome 128, Safari 17.5, Firefox 128, Edge 128
- Operating System (OS): e.g., macOS 14.5, Windows 11, iOS 17.5, Android 14
- Input method(s): keyboard / switch / touch

## ❗ Actual Result
<!-- What happens now (e.g., element not announced, focus lost, insufficient contrast). -->

## ✅ Expected Result
<!-- What should happen (reference best practice or guideline). -->

## 📚 Guideline Reference (Optional)
<!-- Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) criterion if known, e.g., WCAG 2.2.1 Keyboard. -->

## 📎 Evidence
<!-- Screenshots, recordings, Accessibility (a11y) tree, or text from screen reader. -->

## 🔗 Additional Context / Links
<!-- Related issues, Pull Requests (PRs), designs, or audits. -->

---

### ✅ Reporter Checklist
- [ ] I included reproduction steps and environment/assistive tech.
- [ ] I provided evidence and (if known) a Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) reference.
- [ ] I removed or obfuscated secrets and personally identifiable information (PII).
